calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery Compliance Subpoena
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Lisa Breslaw, in pro per present.
Atty. JULIE SCHWARTZ, Esq. of Perkins Coie LLP (Tel: 206-359-8000) for Respondent Reddit, Inc.

Hearing Re: PETITIONER LISA BRESLAW Mtn To Compel Discovery Compliance Subpoena.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The judge pro tem's report and recommendation is adopted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court Reporter: Raquel Sharp, CSR# 10619 (Tel: 925-381-5000/E-mail: raquel@transcriptlegal.com) (302/RBU)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery Compliance Subpoena
Off Calendar Jan-26-2024 Continued To Feb-14-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: RE: PETITIONER LISA BRESLAW's Mtn To Compel Discovery Compliance Subpoena.

Appearances (via Zoom):
Lisa Breslaw, in propria persona, Petitioner.
Julie E. Schwartz, Esq., of PERKINS COIE LLP,

Respondent does not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem deciding this matter.

The matter is argued. At conclusion of argument, the matter is continued to Law & Motion on Feb-14-2024 at 9:30 a.m. The Judge Pro Tem is to prepare and submit a report and recommendation.

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz. Clerk: R. Woods. Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR: 13293, T: (415) 274-9977; E: spham@gmail.com. (302/JPT)
